leadText: Seaward Cave (Japanese: 海繋ぎの洞穴 Seaward Cave) is a location on Melemele Island in Alola. It can be accessed from Melemele Meadow and Kala'e Bay.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The cave starts from the Melemele Meadow tunnel, where the path slopes downward to the southwest into a large pool of water. The player can travel southwest across the water or head southeast into a split path. From here, taking the southwestern path leads to yet another split path; the western path curves around the southern wall of the cave leading towards Kala'e Bay , while the eastern path is a dead end that stops just short of the exit. Taking the southeastern path from the earlier intersection leads to a series of ledges and an indent in the northern wall, where the player can find an Expert Belt behind some breakable rocks. Similarly, there is a small indent in the southern wall with a Star Piece hidden behind a rock.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Escape Rope Next to Melemele Meadow tunnel S M US UM Max Revive West side of the cave (requires Lapras Paddle or Sharpedo Jet ) S M TM79 ( Frost Breath ) West side of the cave, opposite the body of water, south of the fishing spot (requires Lapras Paddle or Sharpedo Jet ) US UM Heal Ball West side of the cave, southwest of the Melemele Meadow tunnel S M US UM Expert Belt Behind the rocks on the path down (requires Tauros Charge S M ) S M US UM Stardust In between the three big rocks west of the pool near the Kala'e Bay entrance (hidden) S M US UM Super Potion West of the pool near the Kala'e Bay entrance S M US UM Star Piece South of the pool near the Kala'e Bay entrance, behind a rock (hidden) S M US UM Never-Melt Ice North of the pool near the Kala'e Bay entrance S M US UM Fishing [ edit | edit source ] Sometimes when fishing , an item will be reeled in instead of a Pokémon. Item Location Games Pearl Randomly reeled in when fishing S M US UM Big Pearl Randomly reeled in while fishing S M US UM Pearl String Randomly reeled in when fishing S M US UM
